headline: Shares Of Retail Clothing Giant TJX Near Another All-Time High
summary: TJX Cos. hit an all-time high on April 9 and has held steady near that level. With the market indicating a rebound is afoot, the popular clothing retailer is well positioned to hit a fresh high. The parent of TJ Maxx, Marshalls, HomeSense and other clothing and home fashions retail chains saw its stock Relative Strength (RS) Rating climb Wednesday, as it got a lift from 70 to 73.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think TJX (TJX) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for TJX (TJX) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?
